Apply mutation to a numeric trait

Source: R/simulate_mutation.R
simulate_mutation.Rd

Adds random variation to a selected numeric trait and optionally bounds the result.

Usage

simulate_mutation(
  agents,
  trait = "efficiency",
  mutation_rate = 0.1,
  mutation_sd = 0.05,
  lower = NULL,
  upper = NULL,
  seed = NULL
)

Arguments

agents

Data frame of agents.

trait

Name of the numeric trait to mutate.

mutation_rate

Probability that each row mutates.

mutation_sd

Standard deviation of mutation noise.

lower

Optional lower bound.

upper

Optional upper bound.

seed

Optional random seed.

Value

A modified data frame with the selected trait mutated.
